title: eryngium duriaei subsp. duriaei
intro: Eryngium duriaei subsp. duriaei, also known as Duria's eryngo or Spanish fern, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Apiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and prevent infection. The health benefits of Eryngium duriaei subsp. duriaei include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and to support digestive health. Eryngium duriaei subsp. duriaei can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
